void.string: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns12="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMOBOUTFASTV2" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMOBFAST" xmlns:ns32="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMER" xmlns:ns23="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTINFO" xmlns:ns19="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSVLPAYMENT" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/CPBGETINTERESTRATE" xmlns:ns2="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:ns14="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBTHPAYMENT" xmlns:ns25="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTSTMT" xmlns:ns29="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITY" xmlns:ns26="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILL" xmlns:ns24="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMB" xmlns:ns38="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBACCTOACCT" xmlns:ns3="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns35="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYOPENFD" xmlns:ns37="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGKHQRTXNIN" xmlns:ns1="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3/CrossBorderPayment/Input" xmlns:ns39="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3" xmlns:ns30="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTMB" xmlns:ns17="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTFTMB" xmlns:ns22="http://temenos.com/CPBGETCUSTOMERINFO" xmlns:ns15="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMB" xmlns:ns20="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTLIST" xmlns:ns27="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWATERBILL" xmlns:ns33="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBQRPAYMENT" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/CPBGETEXCHANGERATE" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYCPBDMD" xmlns:ns31="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBPPWSABILL" xmlns:ns16="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBUTILITYBILL" xmlns:ns34="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns18="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBACBILL" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBTOPUP" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILLTOPUPREFUND" xmlns:ns13="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGOUT" xmlns:ns11="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBEDCBILL" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSRBILL" xmlns:ns36="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMERCPBDMD" xmlns:ns28="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBANUALFEE" xmlns:ns21="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBFUNANBILL" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:mytext="mytext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext mytext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_OUT_PORT" select="document('OUT_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <ns1:Envelope> <ns1:Body> <ns39:CrossBorderPayment> <WebRequestCommon> <password> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'password')"></xsl:value-of> </password> <userName> <xsl:value-of select="java:_getStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'username')"></xsl:value-of> </userName> </WebRequestCommon> <OfsFunction> <activityName> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </activityName> <assignReason> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </assignReason> <dueDate> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </dueDate> </OfsFunction> <FUNDSTRANSFERCPBTHPAYMENTType> <xsl:attribute name="id"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns14:DEBITACCTNO> <xsl:value-of select="$document_OUT_PORT/FundTransferRq/FromAccount"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:DEBITACCTNO> <ns14:DEBITTHEIRREF> <xsl:value-of select="'QR Payment'"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:DEBITTHEIRREF> <ns14:CREDITTHEIRREF> <xsl:value-of select="$document_OUT_PORT/FundTransferRq/TransId"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:CREDITTHEIRREF> <ns14:CREDITACCTNO> <xsl:value-of select="$document_OUT_PORT/FundTransferRq/ToAccount"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:CREDITACCTNO> <ns14:CREDITCURRENCY> <xsl:value-of select="$document_OUT_PORT/FundTransferRq/CurrenCy"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:CREDITCURRENCY> <ns14:CREDITAMOUNT> <xsl:value-of select="$document_OUT_PORT/FundTransferRq/Amount"></xsl:value-of> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'ESBX__SYSTEM__USER_DEFINED_DOC_ID', $document_OUT_PORT/FundTransferRq/TransId)"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:CREDITAMOUNT> <ns14:CHARGESACCTNO> <xsl:value-of select="$document_OUT_PORT/FundTransferRq/FromAccount"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:CHARGESACCTNO> <ns14:COMMISSIONAMT> <xsl:value-of select="$document_OUT_PORT/FundTransferRq/TxnFee"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:COMMISSIONAMT> <ns14:gLTXNNARRDR> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns14:LTXNNARRDR> <xsl:value-of select="substring($document_OUT_PORT/FundTransferRq/Remark,'0','35')"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:LTXNNARRDR> <ns14:LTXNNARRDR> <xsl:value-of select="substring($document_OUT_PORT/FundTransferRq/Remark,'35','35')"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:LTXNNARRDR> </ns14:gLTXNNARRDR> <ns14:gLTXNNARRCR> <xsl:attribute name="g"> <xsl:value-of select="'1'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:attribute> <ns14:LTXNNARRCR> <xsl:value-of select="substring($document_OUT_PORT/FundTransferRq/Remark,'0','35')"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:LTXNNARRCR> <ns14:LTXNNARRCR> <xsl:value-of select="substring($document_OUT_PORT/FundTransferRq/Remark,'35','35')"></xsl:value-of> </ns14:LTXNNARRCR> </ns14:gLTXNNARRCR> </FUNDSTRANSFERCPBTHPAYMENTType> </ns39:CrossBorderPayment> </ns1:Body> </ns1:Envelope> </xsl:template> <!--The list of parameters defined by user--> <xsl:param name="_TIF_MESSAGE_"></xsl:param> </xsl:stylesheet>
